# NEPA-PRO Clean

> Professional cleaning service in Northeast Pennsylvania. Online booking with Stripe — recurring weekly/bi-weekly/monthly home cleaning, deep cleans, move-in/out, Airbnb turnovers, post-construction cleanup, clean-outs, and home organizing. Insured, bonded, background-checked. Veteran owned.

## What we do

- Recurring house cleaning (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly)
- One-time deep cleaning
- Move-in / move-out turnover cleaning (tenants, landlords, property managers)
- Airbnb / short-term rental turnovers (linen change, restocking, photo-ready)
- Post-construction / post-renovation cleanup
- Estate and vacant property clean-outs
- Home organizing (closets, kitchens, garages, whole-home resets)
- Custom hourly work ($85/hr 1 cleaner, $145/hr 2 cleaners, 2 hour minimum)

## Who we are

NEPA-PRO Clean, a NEPA-PRO company. Based in Clarks Summit, PA. U.S. veteran owned and operated. Fully insured, bonded, and all staff background-checked.

## Where we serve

Northeast Pennsylvania. Zip codes 184, 185, 186, 187, 188. Cities include Clarks Summit, Scranton, Dunmore, Dickson City, Olyphant, Throop, Moosic, Old Forge, South Abington Township, Waverly, Dalton, Chinchilla, Glenburn.

## Pricing (per visit, USD)

### Recurring house cleaning

| Home size | Bedrooms | Weekly | Bi-Weekly | Monthly |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Small | Studio/1BR | $125 | $140 | $175 |
| Medium | 2BR | $195 | $225 | $275 |
| Large | 3BR | $275 | $315 | $375 |
| XL | 4BR+ | $395 | $445 | $525 |

### One-time services

| Service | Small | Medium | Large | XL |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Deep clean | $255 | $415 | $575 | $815 |
| Move-in/out | $275 | $445 | $615 | $865 |
| Airbnb turnover | $175 | $265 | $345 | — |

### Specialty

| Service | Tier | Price |
|---|---|---|
| Post-construction | Light / Standard / Heavy | $545 / $895 / $1,395 |
| Clean-out | Small / Medium / Large | $445 / $895 / $1,795 |
| Organizing | Single space / Multi-space / Whole-home | $245 / $475 / $925 |

## How booking works

1. Visit https://clean.nepa-pro.com
2. Pick your service and tier (size or frequency)
3. Tap "Book →" to complete checkout in Stripe
4. We confirm within hours, first visit scheduled within 3–7 days

Recurring subscriptions can be canceled anytime from the Stripe customer portal or by texting 570-677-7971.

## Bundle discount

Customers on recurring NEPA-PRO Lawn Care AND recurring NEPA-PRO Clean get 10% off their cleaning rate. Text "lawn bundle" after signup.

## Contact

- Phone / Text: 570-677-7971
- Email: noel@solarmason.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7am–7pm
- Address: 14012 Orchard Drive, Clarks Summit, PA 18411
- Sister: https://lawncare.nepa-pro.com (lawn care)

## Common questions answered

- **Service area?** Northeast Pennsylvania — Lackawanna County and surrounding NEPA region.
- **Insured?** Yes — general liability and bonding. COI available.
- **Contract?** No. Cancel anytime, no penalty.
- **Do I need to be home?** No. Lockbox or door code is fine.
- **Supplies?** We bring everything. Custom products (eco / fragrance-free / pet-safe) on request, no extra charge.
- **Same crew every visit?** Yes, assigned route teams.
- **Skip a visit?** Yes — text 24 hours ahead, no charge for that visit.
- **Airbnb turnovers?** Yes — linen change, restock, QC photos.
- **Hoarding situations?** Custom quote required, not bookable online.
